From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

[![logo](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/9/99/Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg/40px-Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg.png)](/wiki/File:Wiktionary-logo-en-v2.svg)

Look up ***[Brooklyn](https://en.wiktionary.org/wiki/Brooklyn "wiktionary:Brooklyn")*** in Wiktionary, the free dictionary.

**[Brooklyn](/wiki/Brooklyn "Brooklyn")** is a borough of New York City.

**Brooklyn** may also refer to:

## Places

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Places")]

### Australia

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Australia")]

* [Brooklyn, Victoria](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Victoria "Brooklyn, Victoria"), a suburb of Melbourne
* [Brooklyn, New South Wales](/wiki/Brooklyn,_New_South_Wales "Brooklyn, New South Wales"), a fishing town on the edge of Sydney
* [Brooklyn, Tasmania](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Tasmania "Brooklyn, Tasmania"), a suburb of Burnie
* [Brooklyn Park, South Australia](/wiki/Brooklyn_Park,_South_Australia "Brooklyn Park, South Australia"), a suburb of Adelaide
* [Brooklyn Sanctuary](/wiki/Brooklyn_Sanctuary "Brooklyn Sanctuary"), a nature reserve in Queensland

### Canada

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Canada")]

* [Brooklyn, Newfoundland and Labrador](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Newfoundland_and_Labrador "Brooklyn, Newfoundland and Labrador"), a settlement
* [Brooklyn, Yarmouth County, Nova Scotia](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Yarmouth_County,_Nova_Scotia "Brooklyn, Yarmouth County, Nova Scotia"), a small village
* [Brooklyn, Queens County, Nova Scotia](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Queens_County,_Nova_Scotia "Brooklyn, Queens County, Nova Scotia"), a village near Liverpool
* [Brooklyn, Hants County, Nova Scotia](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Hants_County,_Nova_Scotia "Brooklyn, Hants County, Nova Scotia"), a rural community
* [Brooklyn, Prince Edward Island](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Prince_Edward_Island "Brooklyn, Prince Edward Island"), either of two settlements

### Netherlands

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=4 "Edit section: Netherlands")]

* [Breukelen](/wiki/Breukelen "Breukelen"), a town northwest of Utrecht

### New Zealand

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=5 "Edit section: New Zealand")]

* [Brooklyn, Wellington](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Wellington "Brooklyn, Wellington"), a suburb
  + [Brooklyn (New Zealand electorate)](/wiki/Brooklyn_(New_Zealand_electorate) "Brooklyn (New Zealand electorate)"), a parliamentary constituency
* [Brooklyn, Tasman District](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Tasman_District "Brooklyn, Tasman District"), a settlement and rural valley

### South Africa

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=6 "Edit section: South Africa")]

* [Brooklyn, Pretoria](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Pretoria "Brooklyn, Pretoria"), a suburb
* [Brooklyn, Cape Town](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Cape_Town "Brooklyn, Cape Town"), a suburb

### United States

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=7 "Edit section: United States")]

* [Brooklyn, California](/wiki/Brooklyn,_California "Brooklyn, California"), former city annexed to Oakland
* Brooklyn, California, former name of [Red Dog, California](/wiki/Red_Dog,_California "Red Dog, California")
* [Brooklyn, Connecticut](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Connecticut "Brooklyn, Connecticut"), a town
  + [Brooklyn (CDP), Connecticut](/wiki/Brooklyn_(CDP),_Connecticut "Brooklyn (CDP), Connecticut"), its central village
  + [Brooklyn Green Historic District](/wiki/Brooklyn_Green_Historic_District "Brooklyn Green Historic District"), at the center of the village
* [Brooklyn (Waterbury)](/wiki/Brooklyn_(Waterbury) "Brooklyn (Waterbury)"), Connecticut
* [Brooklyn (Jacksonville)](/wiki/Brooklyn_(Jacksonville) "Brooklyn (Jacksonville)"), Florida
* [Brooklyn, Illinois](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Illinois "Brooklyn, Illinois")
* [Brooklyn, Indiana](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Indiana "Brooklyn, Indiana")
* [Brooklyn, Iowa](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Iowa "Brooklyn, Iowa")
* [Brooklyn, Kentucky](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Kentucky "Brooklyn, Kentucky"), now part of Dayton, Kentucky
* [Brooklyn, Baltimore](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Baltimore "Brooklyn, Baltimore"), Maryland
* [Brooklyn Park, Maryland](/wiki/Brooklyn_Park,_Maryland "Brooklyn Park, Maryland"), in Anne Arundel County but adjacent to Brooklyn, Baltimore
* [Brooklyn, Michigan](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Michigan "Brooklyn, Michigan")
* [Brooklyn, Minnesota](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Minnesota "Brooklyn, Minnesota"), a former township in Saint Louis County, now part of Hibbing, Minnesota
* [Brooklyn Center, Minnesota](/wiki/Brooklyn_Center,_Minnesota "Brooklyn Center, Minnesota"), a city formerly part of Brooklyn Township in Hennepin County
* [Brooklyn Park, Minnesota](/wiki/Brooklyn_Park,_Minnesota "Brooklyn Park, Minnesota"), a city formerly part of Brooklyn Township in Hennepin County
* [Brooklyn, Missouri](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Missouri "Brooklyn, Missouri")
* Brooklyn, [East Otto, New York](/wiki/East_Otto,_New_York "East Otto, New York"), a hamlet in Cattaraugus County
* Brooklyn, [Franklin, Delaware County, New York](/wiki/Franklin,_Delaware_County,_New_York "Franklin, Delaware County, New York"), a former hamlet
* Brooklyn, a neighborhood in [Charlotte, North Carolina](/wiki/Charlotte,_North_Carolina "Charlotte, North Carolina")
* Brooklyn, part of [Glenwood-Brooklyn Historic District](/wiki/Glenwood-Brooklyn_Historic_District "Glenwood-Brooklyn Historic District") in Raleigh, North Carolina
* [Brooklyn, Ohio](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Ohio "Brooklyn, Ohio")
* [Old Brooklyn](/wiki/Old_Brooklyn "Old Brooklyn"), Cleveland, Ohio
* [Brooklyn, Portland, Oregon](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Portland,_Oregon "Brooklyn, Portland, Oregon")
* Brooklyn, Washington
* [Brooklyn, West Virginia (disambiguation)](/wiki/Brooklyn,_West_Virginia_(disambiguation) "Brooklyn, West Virginia (disambiguation)")
* [Brooklyn, Wisconsin (disambiguation)](/wiki/Brooklyn,_Wisconsin_(disambiguation) "Brooklyn, Wisconsin (disambiguation)")
* [Brooklyn Township (disambiguation)](/wiki/Brooklyn_Township_(disambiguation) "Brooklyn Township (disambiguation)")

## Arts and entertainment

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=8 "Edit section: Arts and entertainment")]

### Film and television

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=9 "Edit section: Film and television")]

* [*Brooklyn* (film)](/wiki/Brooklyn_(film) "Brooklyn (film)"), a 2015 romantic drama based on Colm Tóibín's novel
* *[Brooklyn Nine-Nine](/wiki/Brooklyn_Nine-Nine "Brooklyn Nine-Nine")*, an American police procedural sitcom (2013-2021)
* *Wyatt Cenac: Brooklyn*, a standup comedy special
* Brooklyn, a [*Gargoyles* character](/wiki/List_of_Gargoyles_characters#The_Manhattan_Clan "List of Gargoyles characters")
* Brooklyn Masefield, a [*Beyblade* character](/wiki/List_of_Beyblade_characters#Antagonists "List of Beyblade characters")

### Songs

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=10 "Edit section: Songs")]

* "Brooklyn", by [Gloria Loring](/wiki/Gloria_Loring "Gloria Loring") under the alias Cody Jameson, 1977
* "Brooklyn", by Jesse Malina from *[The Fine Art of Self Destruction](/wiki/The_Fine_Art_of_Self_Destruction "The Fine Art of Self Destruction")*, 2002
* "Brooklyn", by Maisie Peters from *[You Signed Up for This](/wiki/You_Signed_Up_for_This "You Signed Up for This")*, 2021
* "Brooklyn", by Mos Def from *[Black on Both Sides](/wiki/Black_on_Both_Sides "Black on Both Sides")*, 1999
* "Brooklyn", by Woodkid from *[Iron](/wiki/Iron_(EP) "Iron (EP)")*, 2011
* "Brooklyn", by the Youngblood Brass Band from *[Center:Level:Roar](/wiki/Center:Level:Roar "Center:Level:Roar")*, 2003
* "Brooklyn (If You See Something, Say Something)", by Taking Back Sunday from *[Louder Now](/wiki/Louder_Now "Louder Now")*, 2006
* "Brooklyn (Owes the Charmer Under Me)", by Steely Dan from *[Can't Buy a Thrill](/wiki/Can%27t_Buy_a_Thrill "Can't Buy a Thrill")*, 1972

### Other media

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=11 "Edit section: Other media")]

* [*Brooklyn* (musical)](/wiki/Brooklyn_(musical) "Brooklyn (musical)"), 2004
* [*Brooklyn* (novel)](/wiki/Brooklyn_(novel) "Brooklyn (novel)"), 2009, by Colm Tóibín
* *Brooklyn*, a 2024 novel by [Tracy Brown](/wiki/Tracy_Brown "Tracy Brown")

## Ships

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=12 "Edit section: Ships")]

* [USS *Brooklyn*](/wiki/USS_Brooklyn "USS Brooklyn"), any of several ships
* [SS *Brooklyn*](/wiki/USS_General_C._C._Ballou "USS General C. C. Ballou"), a container ship relaunched in 1969, formerly the USS *General C. C. Ballou*
* [*Brooklyn* (ship)](/wiki/Voyage_of_the_Brooklyn_Saints#Ship_Brooklyn "Voyage of the Brooklyn Saints"), which brought Mormon pioneers to San Francisco in 1846

## Sports

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=13 "Edit section: Sports")]

### American football

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=14 "Edit section: American football")]

* [Brooklyn Dodgers (AAFC)](/wiki/Brooklyn_Dodgers_(AAFC) "Brooklyn Dodgers (AAFC)"), 1946 to 1949
* [Brooklyn Dodgers (NFL)](/wiki/Brooklyn_Dodgers_(NFL) "Brooklyn Dodgers (NFL)"), 1930 to 1944
* [Brooklyn Lions / Horsemen (1926)](/wiki/Brooklyn_Lions_/_Horsemen_(1926) "Brooklyn Lions / Horsemen (1926)"), a National Football League and first American Football League merged franchise
* Brooklyn Tigers, later [Rochester Tigers](/wiki/Rochester_Tigers "Rochester Tigers"), members of the second American Football League 1936–1937

### Other sports

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=15 "Edit section: Other sports")]

* [Brooklyn (cycling team)](/wiki/Brooklyn_(cycling_team) "Brooklyn (cycling team)"), an Italian professional cycling team 1970–1977
* Brooklyn Dodgers, Major League Baseball team that became the [Los Angeles Dodgers](/wiki/Los_Angeles_Dodgers "Los Angeles Dodgers") in 1958
* [Brooklyn Nets](/wiki/Brooklyn_Nets "Brooklyn Nets"), a professional basketball team in the NBA
* Brooklyn, a [term used in bowling](/wiki/Glossary_of_bowling#B "Glossary of bowling")

## Other uses

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Brooklyn_(disambiguation)&action=edit&section=16 "Edit section: Other uses")]

* [Brooklyn (cocktail)](/wiki/Brooklyn_(cocktail) "Brooklyn (cocktail)")
* [Apache Brooklyn](/wiki/Apache_Brooklyn "Apache Brooklyn"), a distributed computing management framework
* Brooklyn, a chewing gum manufactured by [Perfetti Van Melle](/wiki/Perfetti_Van_Melle "Perfetti Van Melle")
* [Brooklyn Avenue (disambiguation)](/wiki/Brooklyn_Avenue_(disambiguation) "Brooklyn Avenue (disambiguation)")
* [Brooklyn Brewery](/wiki/Brooklyn_Brewery "Brooklyn Brewery")
* [Brooklyn College](/wiki/Brooklyn_College "Brooklyn College")
